results.title: "Erling needs to see this ": BTS' Jimin's hilarious Erling Haaland impression sparks fan frenzy ahead of FIFA World Cup Halftime Show
results.description: BTS' Jimin sent fans into a frenzy after a concert clip showed him seemingly recreating Erling Haaland's signature walk. The playful moment quickly went viral on X, with ARMY flooding social media with jokes and calls for the two stars to meet. The buzz comes just days before BTS joins Justin Bieber, Madonna and Shakira for the historic FIFA World Cup 2026 final halftime show in New York.

results.title: Viral Video Shows Jude Bellingham's Playful Ass Grab On Erling Haaland During England Vs Norway Clash
results.description: A viral video from England's clash against Norway shows Jude Bellingham playfully grabbing Erling Haaland's backside while the pair marked each other during a set piece. Haaland brushed off the gesture with a smile before both shared a laugh. The light-hearted moment delighted fans, highlighting the close friendship between the former Borussia Dortmund teammates.
